meta.name: Guest bookability of 336 podcasts
meta.title: Which Podcasts Actually Book Outside Guests? Guest-Openness Scores for 314 Shows
meta.citation: Let's Make A Podcast (2026). Which Podcasts Actually Book Outside Guests? Guest-Openness Scores for 314 Shows [Data set]. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21310079
meta.description: Openness to a cold guest pitch for podcasts whose public RSS feed could be read, scored on published guest evidence, publishing recency, publishing cadence, and whether the show is network run.
meta.show_list_source: Apple Podcasts (iTunes Search API): public directory data
caveats: publishes_guest_evidence means the show publishes something a listener can check (a named guest in a recent episode title, or a self-description as an interview show). It is NOT proof that a show does or does not book guests: plenty of interview shows simply do not name the guest in the title.
openness_score is our own 0-100 heuristic, not a measured booking rate. Nobody has been pitched to produce it.
Shows whose public feed we could not read are excluded entirely rather than published as blank rows.
A snapshot: feeds were read on the date in feeds_read_on and shows change.
